summary: Tested code quality refactoring changes. Found and FIXED critical bug: 'i is not defined' error in Dashboard.js caused by incorrect variable references after array key refactoring. Two occurrences fixed: line 621 (idx instead of i) and line 686 (hIdx instead of i). All pages now load correctly.

critical_bug.root_cause: During array index key refactoring, the variable 'i' was replaced with descriptive names (idx, hIdx) in .map() callbacks, but two references to 'i' inside the callback bodies were not updated
locations: Line 621: borderBottom condition used 'i' instead of 'idx' in findings.map()
Line 686: line drawing condition used 'i' instead of 'hIdx' in history.map()

features_verified.dashboard_loads: PASS - Cases list, risk score, findings, battle preview, outcome predictor, score history all render
features_verified.upload_page: PASS - No runtime errors (stray 'ad;' fix verified)
features_verified.settings_page: PASS - All tabs work (Account, Plan, Monitor, Notifications, Privacy)
features_verified.document_library: PASS - Browse and Generate modes work
features_verified.jurisdiction_switching: PASS - US to BE and back works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Dashboard.js had 2 occurrences of undefined 'i' variable after array key refactoring - both now corrected
Upload.js stray 'ad;' at end of file was already fixed by main agent

Backend helper functions (_build_realtime_law_context, _build_case_law_for_frontend, _validate_archer_question, _validate_user_arguments, _validate_success_probability, _build_standard_analysis_result, _ensure_contract_guard_fields) are properly extracted and used
Minor: Signup.js has eslint warning for missing 'clearError' dependency in useEffect - not critical
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality refactoring tested. Critical bug found and fixed in Dashboard.js - two 'i is not defined' errors caused by incomplete variable renaming during array key refactoring. All pages now load correctly. Backend helper function extraction verified working. Upload.js stray 'ad;' was already fixed.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: ReferenceError: i is not defined in Dashboard.js
reproduction_steps: 3. Dashboard crashes with 'i is not defined' error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: During the array index key refactoring task, the main agent replaced key={i} with content-based keys and renamed the index variable from 'i' to descriptive names like 'idx' and 'hIdx'. However, two references to 'i' inside the callback bodies were not updated: (1) borderBottom condition in findings.map() at line 621, (2) line drawing condition in history.map() at line 686
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Changed 'i' to the correct variable names: 'idx' for findings.map() and 'hIdx' for history.map()
